title: Profanity
content:
A scrupulous priest of Kildare,
     Used to pay a rude peasant to swear,
        Who would paint the air blue,
        For an hour or two,
     While his reverence wrestled in prayer.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Profanity"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
